caption: A man with short, dark hair and facial stubble is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a large condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. He wears over-ear headphones and a black garment over a grey shirt. The background consists of dark, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression and gaze shift; he initially looks toward the left, then glances upward and toward the right, before returning his gaze to the left and finally looking upward again. His head tilts slightly as he reacts, while his body remains mostly stationary. A small portion of his hand is visible near the microphone in the early part of the clip. There is no visible on-screen text or logos.
